overview: FiberNMS is a carrier-grade Optical Fiber Network Management System — a real-time, AI-powered NOC platform for telecom operators. It features an interactive GIS map, device management for 10K+ devices, network topology visualization, predictive fault intelligence with AI risk scoring, SLA tracking, capacity planning, audit logs, and a global command palette. Built for professional Network Operations Centers managing multi-region fiber infrastructure.
features: Interactive GIS map with fiber route drawing and device placement
Predictive Fault Intelligence with AI risk scoring (0-100) and heatmap overlays
SLA & Service Assurance Dashboard with breach alerts
Capacity Planning & Forecasting with 24-month growth projections
Audit Logs & Compliance panel with timeline view and CSV export
Multi-Layer Network Visualization (L1 Fiber, L2 VLAN, L3 IP topology)
Digital Twin simulation mode for fiber cut and failure scenarios
Global Command Palette (CMD+K) across all devices, alerts, and workflows
Real-time monitoring with 5-second live telemetry updates
AI Assistant with real-time network context injection
10K+ deterministically-generated mock devices with realistic topology
Visual workflow automation builder with pre-built NOC automations
